base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_screen_logo — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 mega man. 'ROCKMAN / MEGA MAN' title screen with 'ORIGINAL BY CAPCOM' subcopy + jumping Mega Man silhouette.
